info.title: The external FluentMigrator runner that integrates into the .NET Core CLI tooling

options.name: --help
options.description: Execute FluentMigrator actions

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --connection
options.description:
The name of the connection
string (falls back to machine
name) or the connection string
itself to the server and
database you want to execute
your migrations against.

options.name: --transaction-mode
options.description:
Overrides the transaction
behavior of migrations, so that
all migrations to be executed
will run in one transaction.
Allowed values are: Migration,
Session.
Default value is: Migration.

options.name: --no-connection
options.description:
Indicates that migrations will
be generated without consulting
a target database. Should only
be used when generating an
output file.

options.name: --processor
options.description:
The kind of database you are
migrating against. Available
choices can be shown with "list
processors".

options.name: --processor-switches
options.description: Provider specific switches.

options.name: --preview
options.description: Only output the migration steps

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Show the SQL statements
generated and execution time in
the console. Default is false.

options.name: --profile
options.description:
The profile to run after
executing migrations.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Overrides the default database
command timeout of 30 seconds.
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output generated SQL to a file.
Default is no output. A filename
may be specified, otherwise
[targetAssemblyName].sql is the
default.

options.name: --assembly
options.description:
The assemblies containing the
migrations you want to execute.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
The namespace contains the
migrations you want to run.
Default is all migrations found
within the Target Assembly will
be run.

options.name: --nested
options.description:
Whether migrations in nested
namespaces should be included.
Used in conjunction with the
namespace option.

options.name: --start-version
options.description:
The specific version to start
migrating from. Only used when
NoConnection is true. Default is
0.

options.name: --working-directory
options.description:
The directory to load SQL
scripts specified by migrations
from.

options.name: --tag
options.description:
Filters the migrations to be run
by tag.

options.name: --allow-breaking-changes
options.description:
Allows execution of migrations
marked as breaking changes.

options.name: --default-schema-name
options.description:
Set default schema name for
VersionInfo table and the
migrations.

options.name: --strip
options.description:
Strip comments from the SQL
scripts. Default is true.

options.name: --include-untagged-migrations
options.description: Include untagged migrations.

options.name: --include-untagged-maintenances
options.description: Include untagged maintenances.

options.name: --allowDirtyAssemblies
options.description: Allows dirty assemblies.

commands.name: processors
commands.description:
List processors
Run 'list [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

Run 'migrate [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

arguments.name: STEPS
arguments.description: The number of versions to rollback.

commands.name: to
commands.description:
Rollback migrations up to a
given version
Run 'rollback [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: VERSION
arguments.description: The target version to rollback to.

commands.name: validate
commands.description:
Validations
Run 'dotnet-fm [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: versions
commands.description:
